output.rationale: Table tagged as 'sub_hourly' in dbt model config. 41.8 runs/day confirms sub-hourly schedule. Clustering would be constantly undermined by load churn — credits wasted.

decision_log.rationale: DBT_MODELS.TAGS contains 'sub_hourly'. DBT_RUN_RESULTS shows 41.8 runs/day. Each load disrupts micro-partition ordering, making clustering counterproductive.

alternatives_considered.reason: Hourly churn would undo clustering within minutes — net negative ROI

tool_calls.input: SELECT m.NAME, m.TAGS, ... FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS m LEFT JOIN DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS rr ON ...
